Class WizardResult

Represents the result returned after executing a wizard.

Inheritance
object
MarshalByRefObject
WizardResult
Inherited Members

object.GetHashCode()

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.Wizard
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
[Serializable]
public sealed class WizardResult : MarshalByRefObject
Remarks

The WizardResult class encapsulates the outcome of a wizard dialog execution. It contains both the dialog result indicating how the wizard was closed and any data produced by the wizard during execution.

The Result property indicates whether the wizard completed successfully, was cancelled by the user, or was aborted due to an error.

When Result is OK, the Data property typically contains the result data generated by the wizard. For other dialog results, this value is usually null.

Constructors

WizardResult(DialogResult, object)

Initializes a new instance of the WizardResult class.

Declaration
public WizardResult(DialogResult result, object data)
Parameters
Type Name Description
DialogResult result

The dialog result indicating how the wizard was closed.
object data

The data produced by the wizard.

Properties

Data

Gets the data produced by the wizard.

Declaration
public object Data { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
object

An object containing the result data returned by the wizard when the wizard completes successfully. If the wizard does not produce data or if the dialog result is not OK, this value may be null.

Result

Gets the dialog result indicating how the wizard was closed.

Declaration
public DialogResult Result { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
DialogResult

A DialogResult value describing the outcome of the wizard dialog, such as OK, Cancel, or Abort.
